name: Zigbee VRV Gateway

description.consumer:
Your entire HVAC system. One tap.

Commercial-grade air conditioning, brought into your smart home. The VRV Gateway connects your VRV/VRF system to — so every unit, every zone, responds to your preferences without requiring a separate app or remote.
description.technical:
A dedicated gateway that integrates VRV/VRF HVAC systems into a Zigbee-based smart automation ecosystem. Connects to the VRV/VRF outdoor unit via LAN cable and communicates wirelessly with a Zigbee gateway.

Enables remote control, real-time monitoring, and automation of the entire VRV/VRF air conditioning system through the Zigbee automation platform — without modifying the HVAC hardware.

Key Specifications
- Device Type: VRV/VRF to Zigbee Integration Gateway
- HVAC Connection: Wired LAN to outdoor unit
- Wireless: Zigbee 3.0 (to Zigbee gateway)
- Installation: Indoor, wired to outdoor unit

⚠ Communication bridge only — does not switch electrical loads. VRV/VRF system compatibility must be confirmed before installation.

specs.summary: Communication Protocol: Zigbee | AC Interface: X, Y (VRF communication port) | Additional Ports: RS485 Peripheral (×2), KNS, RS485 | Power: External power adapter (do not connect 220V directly) | Compatible Brands: Daikin, Samsung, TCL, Gree, Toshiba, Panasonic, Hitachi, Hisense, York, Mitsubishi Electric, Mitsubishi Heavy Industries, AUX, LG, Trane, Midea, Carrier, Bosch, Haier, McQuay and more
specs.installation: Indoor, wired LAN connection to outdoor unit

limitations: Communication bridge only. Does not switch electrical loads. VRV/VRF compatibility must be verified.
dependencies: Zigbee coordinator or hub. Compatible VRV/VRF system required.
